name: Neapolitan Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the fresh peaches and cut into halves, removing pits. Then cut into small cubes or use 8 canned-peach halves.
2. Add sugar and stir well to combine with the fruit pieces.
3. Add orange and lemon juice, stirring thoroughly.
4. Pour in 1/4 cup of apricot brandy and mix all ingredients together.
5. Freeze the mixture.
6. Serve with a tablespoon of apricot brandy floated on top. Additional liqueur can be added if desired.
